name: Rafiul Hasan
bio: Met at BUET during freshman year. We were roommates for 3 years. Now he works as a civil engineer in Chattogram.
why_contact: Check in on his new infrastructure project and catch up on life in Chattogram.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: Grew up in the same para in Mirpur. We've known each other since Class 3. She's now a doctor at Dhaka Medical College Hospital.
why_contact: She mentioned starting a community health camp — want to hear how it went.

name: Tanvir Ahmed
bio: Colleague at a fintech startup in Gulshan. We bond over cricket — rarely miss a Bangladesh match together. Sharp developer and great teammate.
why_contact: Discuss the upcoming Bangladesh vs. India series and his thoughts on the new project stack at work.

name: Sumaiya Akter
bio: Study group partner from Dhaka University. She mentored me through my thesis on Bengali literature. Now a lecturer at Rajshahi University.
why_contact: Ask for her guidance on a research paper I'm drafting. She always gives the sharpest feedback.

name: Imran Chowdhury
bio: Met at Notre Dame College in Dhaka. We travel together every Eid — last trip was Cox's Bazar. He runs a popular travel photography page on Facebook.
why_contact: Plan our next Eid trip and check out his new photo series from Sundarbans.

name: Farida Begum
bio: Family friend from Sylhet. Our parents have known each other for decades. She moved to Sylhet City after marriage but we stay in regular touch.
why_contact: She promised to share her hilsa recipe — also just want to check in on how she's settling in.

name: Sabbir Rahman
bio: Best friend from school in Khulna. We played football together for 6 years. He's now running his family's shrimp export business in Mongla.
why_contact: It's been too long — catch up on the business and reminisce about our Khulna days.

name: Maliha Sultana
bio: We met at a climate action workshop in Dhaka. Both avid readers — we run a small Bengali book club together online. She works for an NGO focused on flood-affected communities.
why_contact: Pick the next book club title and hear about her latest field work in Sylhet's haor region.

name: Arif Hossain
bio: Lab partner from BUET's EEE department. He co-founded a solar energy startup in Bogura after graduating. One of the most driven people I know.
why_contact: Want to learn about his startup's latest solar pilot project and possibly connect him with an investor I know.

name: Riya Chakraborty
bio: Met at Charukala (Faculty of Fine Arts) in Dhaka. She's an incredible painter whose work has been exhibited in Shilpakala Academy. We grab tea in Aziz Super Market regularly.
why_contact: She has a new exhibition coming up — want to confirm I'm attending and hear about the theme.
